leagueBriefing: The Thunder became the first team to 50 wins as Shai Gilgeous-Alexander nears a historic scoring record, while the Hawks extended the league's longest active winning streak to six games.

games.headline: Bane and Banchero power Magic past Timberwolves to claim division lead
games.brief: The Orlando Magic made a loud statement in Minneapolis, using a dominant 19-2 first-half closing run to dismantle the Timberwolves and snap Minnesota's five-game winning streak. Desmond Bane and Paolo Banchero combined for 55 points, overwhelming a Wolves squad that struggled to find any offensive rhythm outside of Anthony Edwards. The victory is particularly significant for Orlando as it vaults them to the top of the Southeast Division standings.
bullets: Desmond Bane led all scorers with 30 points on 10-of-17 shooting.
Paolo Banchero dominated the glass with 25 points and 15 rebounds.
Anthony Edwards provided the bulk of Minnesota's offense with 34 points.
Minnesota shot a season-low 35.7% from the field in the loss.
The Magic moved into first place in the Southeast Division with the win.
games.context: Orlando takes over the lead in the Southeast Division while snapping Minnesota's five-game winning streak.

highlights.title: MAGIC at TIMBERWOLVES | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 7, 2026

games.headline: Nets erase 23-point deficit in Detroit to snap 10-game slide
games.brief: Brooklyn finally found the win column in dramatic fashion, pulling off a massive comeback after trailing by as many as 23 points in the third quarter. Ziaire Williams emerged as the hero, knocking down two clutch triples in the final minutes to stun the Pistons. Despite a double-double from Michael Porter Jr., this game was defined by Brooklyn's grit down the stretch as they outscored Detroit 18-6 in the closing minutes to end their double-digit losing streak.
bullets: Michael Porter Jr. powered the offense with 30 points and 13 rebounds.
Ziaire Williams scored 23 points, including the go-ahead 3-pointer with 25 seconds left.
Detroit's Tobias Harris recorded 18 points and 10 rebounds in the loss.
The Nets forced a crucial shot-clock violation in the final minute to set up the winning shot.
The win ends a 10-game losing streak for Brooklyn.
games.context: Brooklyn snaps a 10-game losing streak with their largest comeback of the season.

highlights.title: NETS at PISTONS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 7, 2026

games.headline: Hawks soar to sixth straight win as Maxey exits with hand injury
games.brief: The Atlanta Hawks are officially the hottest team in the league after securing their sixth consecutive win behind a stellar all-around performance from Jalen Johnson. Atlanta erased a halftime deficit to pull away from a depleted Sixers squad, but the real story for Philadelphia is the health of Tyrese Maxey. The All-Star guard left the game in the final seconds with a right hand injury, adding more concern to a Philly roster already missing Embiid and George.
bullets: Jalen Johnson nearly notched a triple-double with 35 points, 10 rebounds, and 7 assists.
Nickeil Alexander-Walker provided a major spark with 24 points for Atlanta.
Tyrese Maxey scored 31 points before exiting with a hand injury late in the fourth.
Atlanta has now won 7 of their last 8 games to move two games over .500.
The 76ers played without starters Joel Embiid and Paul George.
games.context: Atlanta extends the league's longest active winning streak to six games while Philadelphia awaits X-ray results on Tyrese Maxey.

highlights.title: 76ERS at HAWKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 7, 2026

games.headline: Leonard and Garland lead Clippers' late surge past shorthanded Grizzlies
games.brief: Kawhi Leonard and Darius Garland took over late to help the Clippers survive a scare in Memphis. Despite trailing by 19 early and hitting a season-low four 3-pointers, Los Angeles found a way to win by grinding it out at the free-throw line. The Grizzlies fought valiantly without Ja Morant, but their short-handed rotation couldn't close the door in the final two minutes as the Clippers continued their climb back toward playoff relevance.
bullets: Kawhi Leonard led the Clippers with 28 points.
Darius Garland scored 11 of his 21 points in the decisive fourth quarter.
The Clippers won despite shooting a season-low 4-for-17 from 3-point range.
Ty Jerome led Memphis with 23 points and 7 assists in a starting role.
The Clippers have won 4 of their last 5 games to reach 31-32 on the season.
games.context: The Clippers move within one game of .500 as they battle for a Western Conference playoff spot.

highlights.title: CLIPPERS at GRIZZLIES | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 7, 2026

games.headline: Antetokounmpo sparkles in limited minutes to end Bucks' skid
games.brief: Giannis Antetokounmpo didn't need much time to make an impact, nearly posting a triple-double in just 27 minutes to help Milwaukee snap a four-game losing streak. The Bucks used a late 13-2 run, sparked by Kyle Kuzma’s perimeter shooting, to pull away from a struggling Jazz team. With Utah missing several key players including Lauri Markkanen, Milwaukee’s depth was on full display as Ryan Rollins and Ousmane Dieng both stepped up with versatile stat lines.
bullets: Giannis Antetokounmpo tallied 27 points, 9 rebounds, and 8 assists in just 27 minutes.
Kyle Kuzma scored 18 points, including 9 during the game-clinching run.
Ryan Rollins recorded a double-double with 13 points and 11 rebounds.
Utah was held to 34.4% shooting from the field and 12-of-49 from deep.
The win snaps a four-game losing streak for the Bucks.
games.context: Milwaukee halts their slide while monitoring Giannis' workload following his return from injury.

highlights.title: JAZZ at BUCKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 7, 2026

games.headline: Thunder reach 50-win mark as Gilgeous-Alexander eyes Chamberlain's record
games.brief: The Oklahoma City Thunder became the first team in the NBA to reach 50 wins this season, holding off a scrappy Warriors squad in a game of runs. Shai Gilgeous-Alexander struggled from the floor but lived at the free-throw line to keep his historic 20-point scoring streak alive. A massive step-back three by SGA in the final minute iced the game, moving him within one game of tying Wilt Chamberlain’s all-time record for consecutive 20-point performances.
bullets: SGA scored 27 points, marking his 125th consecutive game with 20+ points.
The Thunder are the first team in the league to reach 50 wins this season.
Oklahoma City is 5-0 since Gilgeous-Alexander returned from an abdominal strain.
Gui Santos led the short-handed Warriors with 22 points and 11 rebounds.
Stephen Curry missed his 13th straight game for Golden State.
games.context: The Thunder maintain the league's best record while SGA moves one game away from tying Wilt Chamberlain's record of 126 straight 20-point games.

highlights.title: WARRIORS at THUNDER | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 7, 2026
